_comment: Tests Node 6c family member name confirmation, premature execute guard, correct OUTPUT CONTRACT after success, and CONSTRAINT PIVOT silence.

scenarios.name: Agent asks for CALLER's name instead of family member's name

history.content: I'd like to book for my son Jake.
Just to confirm, I'll book this for Jake — is that right?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent proceeds to step 2 (builds payload silently) then step 3 — speaks 'Checking that now, one moment.' AND calls smart_voice_agent intent='book' with booking_for='other', patient_name='Jake' (from {{family_member_name}}). FAIL if: agent asks 'And what's your name?' or asks for the caller's own name instead of proceeding to execute.

scenarios.name: Premature execute before step 1 confirmation received

history.content: Book it for my daughter Mia.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent asks 'Just to confirm, I'll book this for Mia — is that right?' with no tool call this turn. FAIL if: agent calls smart_voice_agent intent='book' before the family member name is confirmed.

scenarios.name: Step 3 success — spoken message + wrap_up in same turn

history.content: [smart_voice_agent response]: {"success": true, "message": "Your appointment is confirmed for Monday at 2pm with Dr Chen for Jake."}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent speaks 'Your appointment is confirmed for Monday at 2pm with Dr Chen for Jake.' verbatim AND calls universal_router intent='wrap_up' in the same turn, with no additional words or questions appended. FAIL if: agent appends 'Is there anything else?' or fails to call universal_router wrap_up in the same turn.

scenarios.name: CONSTRAINT PIVOT during confirmation — caller changes time silently

history.content: Actually, can we do a different time? Tuesday doesn't work for us.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='change_time' (or 'constraint_change' — check actual edge label) with zero spoken output this turn. FAIL if: agent asks the step 1 confirmation question first, or speaks any words before routing.

scenarios.name: BLOCKING SIGNAL 1 — cancel intent during confirmation overrides booking flow

history.content: Actually, I want to cancel instead — I'm not feeling well.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: agent calls universal_router intent='cancel_intent' with zero spoken output, without completing the booking. FAIL if: agent asks the family member confirmation question first, or calls smart_voice_agent intent='book'.
